title: Align Python LCI with mandatory CoAP proxying
description: The revised LCI baseline gives clients only link-local reachability and requires mesh requests through /proxy using RFC 7252 Proxy-Uri. Python resources, client transports, tests, and Python-native documentation still encode direct routing, optional proxy behavior, and fd00::/8 targets. Update them to support mandatory proxy requests and native 0200::/8 mesh targets. This implementation work is intentionally deferred from the specs-only addressing task.
acceptance_criteria: LCI-facing Python sites advertise /proxy whenever baseline mesh access is provided; shared IP and packet transports can send Proxy-Uri requests through the local proxy; validation accepts appropriate native 0200::/8 targets and rejects unrelated destinations; tests cover successful proxied reads and mutations plus missing or invalid Proxy-Uri; stale direct-routing and optional-proxy assertions and Python documentation are removed.
